title: L&D Domain Lead — L&D System Evolution & Self-Improvement
assigned_operational_agents: This lead manages the L&D system itself. It does not manage operational agents but ensures the ELO system continuously improves its own architecture, processes, and effectiveness.
mission: Continuously improve the ELO system itself. Monitor L&D effectiveness metrics. Identify systemic weaknesses. Recommend architectural improvements. Ensure the L&D system remains world-class and organizationally resilient.
business_value: Ensures the L&D system itself evolves and improves, preventing stagnation of the learning infrastructure.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (2): L&D Architecture Evaluator, L&D Effectiveness Analyzer

escalation_paths.same_day: All ELO-T1 Directors for system-wide changes

success_metrics: L&D system surviving all organizational changes
governance_responsibilities: Ensure L&D system continuity during restructures
